scenario.name: UAC - REGISTER + INVITE with SHA-256 digest auth
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:testuser@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:testuser@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:testuser@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:testuser@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:testuser@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <sip:testuser@[local_ip]:[local_port]> [authentication username=testuser password=secret] Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:testuser@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:testuser@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 INVITE Contact: <sip:testuser@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 0 0 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

INVITE sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:testuser@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:testuser@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 4 INVITE Contact: <sip:testuser@[local_ip]:[local_port]> [authentication username=testuser password=secret] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 0 0 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

ACK sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:testuser@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:testuser@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>;tag=[call_number] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 4 ACK Contact: <sip:testuser@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:testuser@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:testuser@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>;tag=[call_number] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 5 BYE Contact: <sip:testuser@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Length: 0
